name: harness-improvements
title: Harness Improvements — Research & Triage
description: Research and triage session for 10 harness improvement areas: dynamic agent delegation, auto-reground, code-quality references, context doc lifecycle, codex integration, parallel decomposition, command modularization, memory integration, agent-written research notes, file-based review UX

assessment.rationale: 10 distinct improvement areas spanning commands, agents, skills, rules, hooks, and new subsystems (memory, codex delegation, context doc lifecycle, gate files). Research/triage focus — decompose into actionable beads issues for future sessions.
